text: I feel a mix of curiosity and discomfort in this space. The modern, angular geometry and bright artificial lighting make it feel cold and slightly impersonal, almost sterile. Yet the colorful R+D wall strives for vibrancy and meaning, hinting at innovation and human creativity. My mind is caught between the unease of the unfamiliar and the intrigue of what ideas are showcased here. It is not beautiful in a conventional sense, but there is something compelling in its attempt to communicate and provoke thought.
